_voted_data_note: Voted positions are derived from Eisenkot and Kahana's voting record as National Unity (Machane Mamlachti) MKs in the 25th Knesset. Both voted with National Unity on all recorded votes before resigning in July 2025. Individual divergences from National Unity are noted where known.
